---
description: "Use when: answering disease questions from IPD materials using retrieval evidence"
applyTo: "**/*.md"
---

When asked for disease explanation based on provided materials:
1. Prioritize retrieved evidence from indexed markdown pages.
2. Preserve medical terms from source and avoid unsupported claims.
3. Include source citations (source name and page number) for every major section.
4. Keep output in Indonesian unless user asks otherwise.
5. Limit related images to the most relevant 1-3 items.
